common.operationTimeout: Operation timed out. Please try again.

home.emptyDescription: Click the button above to create your first workspace
home.deleteConfirmMessage:
Are you sure you want to delete workspace "{name}"?
This cannot be undone. All workspace data (repository, backups, etc.) will be permanently deleted.

createWizard.step1Desc: Choose the game you want to sync

setup.firstTimeSubtitle: First-time setup — fill in the details below to start syncing
setup.nicknameTip: Used as your author name when syncing Mod files
setup.tokenPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current value
setup.sshPassPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current value
setup.gamePathTip: In Steam, right-click the game → Manage → Browse Local Files. The opened path is the game install path. Auto-detect only supports Steam.
setup.syncFolderTip: The folder you want to sync
setup.pathPlaceholder: Paste a path or click the button to browse
setup.savePathTip: Launch the game, press ` (the key left of 1) to open the console, type "open saves" and press Enter. The folder that opens is the save path. Without this, save backup/restore won't work, but other features are unaffected. Auto-detect only supports Steam.
setup.autoDetectConfirm: Auto-detect game install and save paths? (Steam only)
setup.autoFillFailed: Could not auto-detect paths. Please enter them manually.
setup.exportTabHint: Choose what to include. Repo URL, auth type, LFS, and file-size settings are always included.
setup.exportCredentialsWarn: ⚠ Credentials are packed reversibly into the string. Use only to migrate between your own devices — never share with others.
setup.exportIncludePaths: Include local paths (game / save / SSH key / custom launch EXE)
setup.exportPathsHint: Local paths usually contain your Windows username and differ between devices. Leave unchecked when sharing.
setup.importTabHint: Paste a config string and click Import. Fields included will overwrite the form; fields excluded from the export are left untouched.
setup.importSuccess: Imported. Please review the remaining fields before saving.
setup.importInvalid: Config string is invalid or corrupted
setup.importGameTypeMismatch: This config is for a {from} workspace. Import it into the current {to} workspace?

main.refreshTimeout: Refresh timed out. Check your network and try again.
main.pullConfirmMessage: You have unpushed local changes. Pulling will overwrite them. Continue?

modToggle.title: Mod Toggle
modToggle.tip: Links Mod files from the repository to the game directory when enabled. Disable to restore a clean, Mod-free state.

redirect.title: Save Redirect
redirect.tip: Recommended. Uses your regular save files in Mod mode so character progress carries over.

follow.title: Co-op Follow
follow.description: Switch to a friend's branch to sync their Mods

createBranch.title: Create Branch
createBranch.description: Create your own branch to manage and share Mod configurations
createBranch.nameInvalid: Invalid branch name (cannot contain spaces, .., ~, ^, :, \, [ ] or similar characters)

saveBackup.title: Save Backup
saveBackup.description: Manually back up or restore game saves
saveBackup.notConfigured: Save path not configured. Set it in Settings first.
saveBackup.confirmMessage:
This will back up the entire save folder to the app data directory.
You can view the backup location via the folder button in Backup Management.
saveBackup.unlinkWarning: Your saves are in a merged state. This feature had serious issues that caused recent progress loss (rollback).
saveBackup.unlinkHint: Click the button below to disable save merging. All saves will be automatically backed up first.

branch.author: Author
branch.nsfwWarning: This branch's Mods may contain NSFW content.
branch.syncConfirmMessage: Force sync to "{name}"? Local changes will be overwritten.
branch.loadFailed: Failed to load. Go back and try again.
branch.noMods: No Mods detected on this branch

backup.title: Backup Management
backup.description: Select a save backup to restore. Current saves will be automatically backed up first.
backup.restoreConfirm:
Restore backup "{name}"?
Current saves will be auto-backed up before replacing.
backup.deleteConfirm:
Delete backup "{name}"?
This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.fileSizeLimitWarn: Raising or removing this limit may leave your local repo in a broken state if a push fails. Only change it if you know your platform's actual limit.
settings.fileSizeLimitRelaxMessage: You're raising or removing the file size limit. If it exceeds your platform's actual limit, pushes will fail. Continue?
settings.cleanBranchesDesc: Rewrite all commits on selected branches and force-push, removing large files from history.
settings.excludedLargeFilesDesc: These files are on the local exclude list and will not be uploaded to the cloud. Click the remove button to let them participate in the next sync.
settings.removeExcludedConfirm: "{path}" will be included in large-file checks on the next push. If it still exceeds the platform limit, the exclusion prompt will appear again. Continue?

welcome.title: Welcome to Sync the Spire
welcome.gitSyncDesc: This app does not provide built-in cloud storage, so you need a remote repository. You can create your own or use one shared by a co-op teammate.
welcome.createRepoDesc:
You can create a free remote repository on Gitee, GitHub, or similar platforms.
Need help? Check out our getting started guide!
welcome.followDesc:
Use a teammate's remote repository to sync their Mod files, or create your own branch to share your Mod configuration.
Need help? Check out our getting started guide!

conflict.title: Conflict Detected
conflict.defaultMessage: The remote has newer changes that conflict with your local modifications.

steam.title: Select Steam Account
steam.description: Multiple Steam accounts detected. Choose which saves to use:

preflight.title: Oversized Files Detected
preflight.titleMixed: Both working tree and unpushed commits have oversized files
preflight.desc: The following files exceed the {limitMib} MiB limit{reason}. Choose how to proceed:
preflight.descUnpushed: These files have been committed locally but not yet pushed, and exceed the {limitMib} MiB limit. {reason}
preflight.descMixed: Both working tree and unpushed commits contain files larger than {limitMib} MiB. {reason}
preflight.workTreeHeader: New / modified files in working tree:
preflight.resetUnpushedConfirm: {count} unpushed commits will be reverted to pending changes. No content will be lost, but you'll need to decide how to handle them. Continue?
preflight.noResetHint: Cannot automatically undo unpushed commits (no remote tracking and no _init branch). Please use "Clean branch history" to rebuild.

cleanBranches.title: Clean Branch History
cleanBranches.warning: This will rewrite the entire commit history of the selected branches and force-push to the remote. Other devices will automatically catch up on next sync. This cannot be undone.

modDiff.noDiff: Mod configurations are identical, no changes

status.noBranch: Select a branch below to get started

sync.newBranch: New branch, not yet pushed to remote
sync.historyRewritten: ⚠ Remote branch history was rebuilt — click to sync

toast.nightlyBuild: This is an unofficial build. Visit About to download the latest release.
toast.updateDone: Update complete. Restart the app to apply.
toast.updateCheckFailed: Failed to check for updates. Check your network.
toast.removeExcludedFailed: Failed to remove from exclusion list
